##### PACKAGES

## Pre-employment skills tests that help you accomplish your unique hiring goals.

‍

### Growth

For organizations interested in getting started with basic pre-hire assessments for a few roles. 
‍ 
Includes:

* Standardized Tests
 
* Customized Mix-and-Match Tests
 
* Complete Test Library
 
* Anti-Cheat Tools
 
* Standard ATS Integrations
 
* Video Questions
 
* Custom Branding
 
* Behavioral Tests
 
* 30-Day Onboarding
 
* Email, Chat, and Phone Support
 
* Candidate Support
 

Talk To Sales

### Scale

For organizations who want to make pre-hire assessments a key part of their hiring process for most roles. 
‍ 
Includes everything in Growth plus:

* One-Way Interviews
 
* Custom Questions
 
* Test Uploads & Digitization
 
* Team Grading
 
* Assessment Consulting
 
* Dedicated Account Manager
 

Talk To Sales

### Custom

For larger organizations committed to assessing candidates' skills across multiple divisions or locations. 
 
Includes everything in Scale plus hyper-personalized implementation, solutions, and best practices to achieve your hiring goals.  

Talk To Sales

[](/platform-features/assessment-type/skills/#hard-skills)

### FAQs

Does eSkill integrate with my ATS?

eSkill integrates with most Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS.) Whether natively or via an API, you can use our pre-employment assessment platform alongside your existing HR workflows.

What does a Dedicated Assessment Expert do?

Dedicated Assessment Experts collaborate with you and your team to create original, tailor-made assessments from the ground up. From there, we’ll help you administer tests, analyze results, and iterate until your assessments perfectly fit your hiring goals.

How do I know which plan is right for my organization?

All eSkill Packages Include:

* Access to the complete eSkill test library.

* Pre-built assessments by subject or job role.

* Customizable assessments built on existing questions.

If you require truly customized questions or guidance from our Dedicated Assessment Experts, Growth or Scale packages likely make the most sense for your business.

"We utilize eSkill to determine a candidate's capability that may not have the direct experience listed on their resume. This tool is very useful for Hiring Managers who may need some convincing to pull the trigger. The software is user-friendly, and customer service is very responsive."

Kristina Surerus

AJM Packaging

"eSkill enables managers to easily assess the current knowledge level or new hires because it allows us to anticipate interventions. This helps better prepare new hires for our job environment and helps them ‘get up to speed’ more quickly. The data extraction process is pretty user-friendly as is using the option to forward test results."

Brandy Greer

AdventHealth

"We hire candidates in various markets throughout the U.S. By using eSkill, we now have the capability to test candidates and quickly evaluate their skills and aptitudes to ensure we are identifying the best candidate for each role."

Jessica Wagner

Vatica Health

"We have reduced time-to-hire by at least two or three days simply by eliminating inefficiencies in our process. Recruiters no longer have to manually screen applicants and there is no need to go back and forth with candidates to schedule and conduct interviews."

Jeremiah Smith

Slingshot Technology

"Quick ability to generate assessments. Complete customization capability for your company's vision of assessments. Report generation for easy candidate comparison. Good pricing for product received. Very helpful for being able to generate which specific assessments we desire. Compare each candidate against another without having a generic canned assessment test."

Kelly Irvin

Mechanical Concepts

Endless possibilities but easy to use. Endless combinations of testing/simulations content stays current and spans across so many disciplines. Was able to truly see candidate knowledge concerning specific disciplines and their ability to successfully get the job done.

Rosana Zorrilla

Highpoint Capital

Great System! It's very easy to use and extremely customizable. It's been a great experience and I feel the test I was able to create for our teller candidates definitely helps us narrow down those who have the right skills and talents.

Catherine Kuhl

Village Bank

"Seamless and easy; great support. Ability to assemble own tests. Ease of sending test notices and score reporting. great communication with eskills staff members."

‍

Michael Spreng

City of Cleveland

As our company really started to grow in size, we started to notice the pains from hiring managers about the quality of candidates and recent hires. There was pressure to fill open roles as quickly as possible. Once we started to use eSkill, we saw improved confidence when hiring and more qualified employees. Our managers were on board with using eSkill, mainly because we were able to work together to create specific assessments. We have not looked back since!

Erin Williams

Acertus

eSkill has enhanced our pre-employment skills testing. With the large database of questions readily available, it is easy to create or alter a test to fit a specific position or department. The website is user friendly for both the applicant and the administrator. The people at eSkill have been extremely helpful and friendly on any question that has arisen.

Shonna Wessels

FedEx

We chose eSkill because it meets and exceeds our needs. eSkill is unmatched in its ability to manage franchise locations, customize and configure tests, and customer service. The platform makes test deployment fast and easy, while our dedicated account manager has been very proactive in making sure we get the most out of eSkill. We would recommend eSkill to anyone who is looking to identify skilled candidates.

Jason Leverant

AtWork

“eSkill helped us complete the circle in our hiring and screening process by providing a simple-to-use testing platform. This platform set the perfect stage to verify skills and abilities for applicants ranging from entry level customer service to senior level software engineers. Our hiring managers have been very pleased with the variety of standard tests available, along with our ability to create and post our own tests. This system has literally saved us hundreds of working hours.”

Seth Pickett

1-800 Contacts

“The testing went great! We loved the ability to create our own test from a bank of existing questions. It was a key part of our search process and we found an excellent candidate. As I said, we don’t do searches for technical positions very often, but when we do, eSkill testing will always be a part of it.”

Bob Nichols

University of Maryland

"eSkill assessments are the only way we can validate the candidates’ skill level. eSkill has been a good tool for us overall and as far as I know is very user friendly. We use it as a selling point to clients that we thoroughly vet our candidates before they are sent out for either interviews or placements."

Judy Contreras

AtWork
